headline: Teradyne AI Test Platforms Raise Questions On Growth And Valuation
summary: Teradyne (NasdaqGS:TER) has introduced the Photon 100 opto-electric test platform for silicon photonics and co-packaged optics. The company also launched the Omnyx manufacturing test platform aimed at AI and data center circuit board assemblies. Both platforms target testing needs tied to AI data centers and advanced manufacturing, addressing new requirements for high-speed optical and complex board testing. Teradyne, known for automated test equipment used across semiconductors and...
